package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for strings_hassuffix_then_trimsuffix: `if strings.HasSuffix(s, p) { s = strings.TrimSuffix(s, p) }`
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario657Positive(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return len(haystack) >= len(needle) && haystack[len(haystack)-len(needle):] == needle
}
